creator: sanpei@yy.cs.keio.ac.jp
text:
The release date in www.freebsd.org/releases/index.html is not correct.

  in releases/index.html
	Release 2.2 RELEASE (March, 1997)
	Release 2.2.1 RELEASE (June, 1997) <-- newer date than 2.2.2-R
	Release 2.2.2 RELEASE (May, 1997)

  I hope to fix it as follows.

Thank you.

Fix: patch to www/data/releases/index.html
